base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of special_world — a tile from 1990 super mario world. Special World — Funky/Awesome/Groovy/Outrageous/Tubular/Gnarly/Way Cool/Mondo. 8 endgame challenge stages. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Special World — Funky/Awesome/Groovy/Outrageous/Tubular/Gnarly/Way Cool/Mondo. 8 endgame challenge stages
